_meta.description: Feature tracking queue. Each slug maps to FR numbers from the PRD.

features.title: Accounts, Profiles, and Membership Access
features.notes: FR-4 is P1 (admin verification). All others P0.

features.title: Course Discovery, Access Filtering, and Search
features.notes: PostGIS required. FR-15, FR-16 are P1. Airport/geocoding integration required.

features.title: Course Quality, Value, and Recommendation Model
features.notes: FR-20, FR-21, FR-22 are P1. Community score separate from composite.

features.title: Shortlisting, Decisioning, and Voting
features.notes: FR-26, FR-28 are P1. Captain override (FR-27) blocked by Open Decision #5.

features.title: Booking Window Intelligence and Tee-Time Coordination
features.notes: All P0. Booking room is real-time. Hybrid execution model. Blocked by aggregator API spike.

features.title: Continuous Optimization and Rebooking
features.notes: FR-38, FR-40 are P1. Swap constraints in Section 8.7.1. Background monitoring job.

features.title: Optional Lodging and Air Travel
features.notes: FR-44 is P0 (link-out + itinerary capture, belongs in M3). FR-46 is P2. Blocked by Open Decision #3.

features.title: Shared Itinerary and Logistics
features.notes: FR-49, FR-50 are P1. Canonical day-by-day itinerary view.

features.title: In-Round Scoring, Games, and Side Bets
features.notes: FR-55, FR-56 are P1. Game templates blocked by Open Decision #2. Mobile-first score entry.

features.title: Trip Photos, Consent, and Shareable Microsites
features.notes: FR-59, FR-61, FR-62 are P1. S3/CDN required. PhotoAsset state machine. Privacy-first.

features.title: History, Rivalries, and Gamification
features.notes: FR-63 is P0. FR-64, FR-65 are P1. FR-66 is P2 (badges post-launch).

features.title: Fees, Billing, and Revenue Logic
features.notes: FR-71 is P1. Stripe Connect integration. Blocked by Open Decision #1 (fee schedule).

features.title: Notifications and Communication
features.notes: FR-73 is P1. Activity feed (FR-74) needed early in M1 for trip state logging. Email + SMS providers required.

features.title: Admin, Editorial, and Concierge Operations
features.notes: FR-77, FR-78 are P1. Separate internal web console. FR-75/76/79 are P0 launch deps.

features.title: Trip Cost Splitting and Reimbursement
features.notes: All P1. Expense ledger + settlement deep links. Non-custodial. Should ship before GA.

spikes.title: Aggregator API Cart-Hold Investigation
spikes.description: Test GolfNow/Supreme Golf APIs for hold-endpoint availability, rate limits, multi-hold policies, rollback behavior.

spikes.title: PostGIS Configuration and Spatial Query Patterns
spikes.description: Set up PostGIS, validate airport/radius queries, drive-time filtering, and geographic ranking.
